first_dialog: Do you need anything? By the way, if you're here to sell me that new high-powered weed killer, I'm not interested.
Oh, no, I'm not Bob. I'm his identical twin Rob. We get confused a lot. Mom also liked him better...
So, what do you want? I don't have all day to yap about my family tree.

Oh, you're that kid that's been going around the neighborhood and mowing people's lawns? Well then, I've heard some decent things about you - sure why not. Just be careful: the weeds have gotten even more aggressive over the past couple of days.
Something's going on but I don't know what...
player_dialog: Do you need your lawn mowed?
first_job_offer: Sorry about that, I've been listening to Neighbor Hunter's conspiracy podcast too much recently. So yeah, are you still willing to mow my lawn?
